PromptHistory.title: Prompt History
PromptHistory.description: A record of a generated style prompt.

uid.description: The user ID of the person who generated the prompt.

mode.description: The mode used to generate the prompt.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the prompt was generated.

thumbnailUrls.description: A list of thumbnail URLs for the images used to generate the prompt (optional, for history display).

prompts.description: A collection of generated style prompts.
